auth.newHere: Tuntun nibi? Wo bi RuralPay ṣe nṣiṣẹ →
auth.registerAsMerchantSubtitle: Gba Awọn Isanwo Fun Iṣowo Rẹ
auth.businessInformationSubtitle: Sọ fun wa nipa iṣowo rẹ lati bẹrẹ gbigba awọn isanwo
auth.notAMerchant: Mí kii ṣe oniṣowo — fo igbesẹ yọi
auth.verifyPhoneSubtitle: Tẹ Koodu Awọn Nọmba 6 ti a firanṣẹ nipasẹ SMS, WhatsApp, ati Imeeli
auth.enterPersonalDetails: Tẹ Awọn Alaye Ti Ara Ẹni Rẹ
auth.stepPersonalHint: A nilo awọn alaye rẹ lati ṣẹda akọọlẹ rẹ. Eyi gba nipa iṣẹju 2.
auth.stepMerchantHint: Eyi gba wa laaye lati fi ebute isanwo rẹ sii ki awọn onibara le san wọn fun ọ.
auth.stepPhoneHint: A n jẹrisi pe nọmba yii jẹki rẹ — o daabo bo akọọlẹ rẹ.
auth.stepRoadmapTitle: Eyi ni ohun ti o nireti
auth.bvnHelp: BVN rẹ jẹki nọmba 11 ti o so akọọlẹ banki rẹ pọ. Pe *565*0# lori neti eyikeyi lati gba rẹ lofe.
auth.livenessSubtitle: A nilo lati jẹrisi pe o jẹki rẹ
auth.livenessWhyHint: Eyi jẹrisi pe o jẹki eniyan gidi o si baamu oju rẹ pelu igbasilese BVN rẹ. O gba nipa iṣẹju aaya 10.
auth.livenessStep2: Yi ori rẹ laiyara nigbati a ba rẹ ni
auth.livenessStep3: Oju rẹ ti baamu BVN rẹ — tan
auth.livenessPrivacyNote: A n ṣe ayewo oju rẹ ni ailewu ko si fi pamọ lori ero yii.
auth.phoneVerifiedSuccess: Nọmba Foonu Ti Jẹrisi Ni Aṣeyọri
auth.resendFailed: Kuna lati tun koodu ranṣẹ. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.

transactions.transferMoneyDescription: Gbigbe Owo Si Awọn Akọọlẹ Miiran

bankTransfer.title: Gbigbe Owo Ile-ifowopamọ
bankTransfer.accountVerifyFailed: Jọwọ Jẹrisi Awọn Alaye Akọọlẹ. Ibeere Orukọ Kuna.
bankTransfer.accountVerifyFailedTransfer: Idaniloju Akọọlẹ Kuna. Ko Le Tẹsiwaju Pẹlu Gbigbe.

onboarding.slide1Subtitle: Tẹ kaadi rẹ lori ebute RuralPay eyikeyi ki o sanwo ni iṣẹju aaya 2 — ṣiṣẹ paapaa laisi nẹtiwọọki.
onboarding.slide2Subtitle: Gbe si akọọlẹ banki Naijiria eyikeyi lẹsẹkẹsẹ. Tẹ nọmba akọọlẹ tabi ṣayẹwo koodu QR.
onboarding.slide3Subtitle: Isanwo kọọkan nilo ika ọwọ tabi oju rẹ. Ko si ẹnikan ti o le firanṣẹ owo lati akọọlẹ rẹ.

linkBankAccount.verificationSubtitle: Lati sọ akoọlẹ banki rẹ pọ ni ailewu, a nilo lati jeriṣi pe o ni akoọlẹ naa.
linkBankAccount.step1: A o gé ₦50 kuro ninu akoọlẹ rẹ
linkBankAccount.step2: Eyi jeriṣi pe o ni akoọlẹ naa
linkBankAccount.step3: Akoọlẹ Rẹ Yoo Sọ Pọ Leṣeṣekeṣe
linkBankAccount.linkSuccess: Akoọlẹ Ti Sọ Pọ Ni Aṣeyọri
